AI Definitions

The CME FedWatch Tool forecasts the probability of a rate hike (or rate cut) at the FOMC meeting based on the prices of 30-Day Federal Funds (ZQ) futures released traded on CME. The futures prices reflect market expectations of the effective federal funds rate (EFFR).
The chart outlines the FedWatch probability forecasts for each upcoming FOMC meetings.

The CME FedWatch Tool forecasts the probability of a rate hike (or rate cut) at the FOMC meeting based on the prices of 30-Day Federal Funds (ZQ) futures released traded on CME. The futures prices reflect market expectations of the effective federal funds rate (EFFR).
The chart outlines the FedWatch probability forecasts for each upcoming FOMC meetings.

class="custom-control-label" for="collection-chart-zonenewest-value-toggle">Latest Values <span class="badge mm-prime mm-biz"> Biz </span></label></div><div class="dropdown-item custom-switch custom-switch-sm" style="padding-left: 45px;"><input type="checkbox" class="custom-control-input plotbands-toggle" id="collection-chart-zoneplotbands-toggle" true-value="true" class="btn-label">Enlarge</span></button></div></div><div class="chart-theater-sidebar mm-scrollbar"><div class="sidebar-sec-luv" style="padding: 5px 15px; text-align: right;"><div class="d-flex justify-content-between" style="color: rgb(82, 96, 105);"><!-- AI 註解開關 --><div class="custom-control custom-switch custom-switch-sm"><input type="checkbox" class="custom-control-input" id="ai-desc-toggle"><label class="custom-control-label" for="ai-desc-toggle" style="vertical-align: middle;">AI Definitions</label></div><span class="btn-luv luv luv-chart-77 disabled" data-luv="{&quot;obj&quot;:&quot;chart&quot;,&quot;id&quot;:77,&quot;liked&quot;:null}" data-original-title="" title=""><i class="fas fa-bookmark"></i></span></div></div><!-- 描述 --><div class="sidebar-sec sidebar-sec-desc rm-expanded"><div class="desc-text" style="white-space: pre-line; display: none;">The <span title="<b>CME FedWatch Tool:</b><br/>The CME FedWatch Tool is a tool by the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) used to forecast the probability of upcoming changes to the federal funds rate." class="ai-tips">CME FedWatch Tool</span> forecasts the probability of a <span title="<b>rate hike:</b><br/>An increase in the interest rate by the central bank, usually to combat inflation and prevent the economy from overheating" class="ai-tips">rate hike</span> (or <span title="<b>rate cut:</b><br/>The central bank usually lowers the benchmark interest rate to stimulate economic growth and boost credit and consumer spending, so as to prevent a recession." class="ai-tips">rate cut</span>) at the <span title="<b>FOMC:</b><br/>The Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) is a monetary policy decision-making body in the United States, responsible for overseeing open market operations and determining the direction of US monetary policy." class="ai-tips">FOMC</span> meeting based on the prices of 30-Day <span title="<b>Federal Funds (ZQ) futures:</b><br/>Fed funds futures are futures contracts based on the federal funds rate. Prices of fed funds futures reflect market expectations for the federal funds rate." class="ai-tips">Federal Funds (ZQ) futures</span> released traded on CME. The futures prices reflect market expectations of the <span title="<b>effective federal funds rate (EFFR):</b><br/>The effective federal funds rate (EFFR) is the unsecured overnight lending rate between institutions in the federal funds market, including depository institutions, Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae, and other government-sponsored enterprises (GSEs). The EFFR is an important benchmark for short-term interest rates, influencing interest rates across the economy." class="ai-tips">effective federal funds rate (EFFR)</span>.
 
The chart outlines the FedWatch probability forecasts for each upcoming FOMC meetings.</div><div class="desc-text" style="white-space: pre-line;">The CME FedWatch Tool forecasts the probability of a rate hike (or rate cut) at the FOMC meeting based on the prices of 30-Day Federal Funds (ZQ) futures released traded on CME. The futures prices reflect market expectations of the effective federal funds rate (EFFR).
 
The chart outlines the FedWatch probability forecasts for each upcoming FOMC meetings.</div><button class="btn-expand" onclick="$('.sidebar-sec-desc').addClass('expanded');"><span>More</span></button></div><!-- 額外按鈕 --><div class="sidebar-sec" style="padding: 10px 10px 20px 15px; border-bottom: 0px;"><a id="mm-side" class="" href="https://next.macromicro.me/en" target="_self"><img src="https://cdn.macromicro.me/523af537/2026-06/6410/904da78f-28274.jpg" class="d-block" style="width: 100%; height: auto;"></a></div><!-- 最新數據 --><div class="sidebar-sec chart-stat-lastrows"><h4 class="sidebar-sec-title">Latest Stats</h4><ul></ul></div><!-- 相關圖組 --><div class="sidebar-sec"><h4 class="sidebar-sec-title">Related Collections</h4><div class="sidebar-sec-content mm-rel-links"><ul></ul></div></div><!-- 相關文章 --><!--v-if--><!-- 資料來源 --><div class="sidebar-sec"><h4 class="sidebar-sec-title">Source</h4><div class="sidebar-sec-content mm-rel-links"><ul></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container mm-cc-secondary-container"><div class="chart-secondary-wrapper"><div class="secondary-main"><!----><div><h4 class="secondary-title"> AI Recommended Charts <a class="text-primary small"><i class="far fa-question-circle"></i></a></h4><div class="row slim-gutters pb-4"><div class="col-6 col-lg-4 col-xl-3 mb-3"><div class="card card--inner-borders"><a href="/charts/734/us-bond-interest-rate-change" data-trk4="{&quot;evt&quot;:&quot;click_ref_chart&quot;}" class="pic pic-sized pic-sized-16x9 pic-default-chart-wall" title="US -
